option_line: BFFI_onBoardingStateroomDowngrade:"If you wish, you will be given a crew-berth."
original: If you wish, you will be given a crew-berth.
Bornanew nods, not quite a bow. "You are right, of course."
Bornanew nods, not quite a bow. "My apologies, I did not intend to spurn your hospitality. It is a virtue."
"If you would, please," Bornanew says with a nod that isn't quite a bow. "It would be most appropriate for my service of penance."

Novice Bornanew speaks from the head of the table on which he has placed a paper notebook. He seems disinclined to use the shared workspace of the holo visualization suite; you're not even sure he brought a datapad.

"...collector who now possesses this duplicate relic is a man by the name Menes Yaribay, a minor member of Gens Yaribay of Kazeron," he looks to you for a sign of recognition.

Of course you know the Yaribays. You were given Horus Yaribay's diplomatic credentials to arrange a meeting with High Hegemon Daud.

Horus Yaribay might owe you a favor, depending on how he views the situation.

Of course you know the Yaribays. You were given Horus Yaribay's diplomatic credentials to arrange a meeting with High Hegemon Daud and have, on at least one occasion, used those credentials to call a favor on account of Gens Yaribay's prestige.

Hopefully he didn't find out.

Of course you know the Yaribays. You were given Horus Yaribay's diplomatic credentials to arrange a meeting with High Hegemon Daud. During that meeting, you handed over the key required for an encrypted channel between Horus Yaribay and Baikal Daud.

Horus Yaribay might owe you a favor, depending on how he views the situation.
